data.title: Terra Chips Maker Hain Celestial Seeks Strategic Options For Business, Announces CEO Transition, Stock Tanks
data.description: Hain Celestial (NASDAQ:HAIN) posted a disappointing Q3 FY25, with revenue down 11% YoY to $390.35M and EPS missing at $0.07 vs. $0.13 expected. North American organic sales dropped 10%, hitting snacks and baby categories.

data.title: Under Armour Faces Tough Road Ahead, Says Analyst
data.description: Telsey Advisory Group analyst Cristina Fernandez reiterated a Market Perform rating on Under Armour Inc (NYSE: UAA) and lowered the price target to $7.00 from $10.00. With ongoing challenges in North America and APAC, the company's Q4 FY25 results and FY26 guidance will be closely watched, particularly regarding demand, product reception, and tariff strategies.

data.title: Lina Khan Warns That Weakening Consumer Protections Will Backfire: 'Made In USA Fraud Will Skyrocket, Punishing Honest American Businesses'
Treasury Sec Scott Bessent: US Should Be The 'Premier Destination For Digital Assets'
data.description: U.S. Treasury Sec. Bessent advocates for American leadership in digital assets and Congress progresses towards solid crypto market structure.

data.title: Hims & Hers Stock Soars 32% Since Tuesday On Strong Q1 Earnings And Robust Outlook
data.description: Hims & Hers Health shares have surged 32.4% since Tuesday's session open. The stock is gaining following a standout first-quarter earnings report released late Monday.
